summary: Round-2 role-vocabulary gaps are fixed, but `verify.mjs` still accepts malformed `routingBias` profile entries that runtime then silently no-op.

findings.title: `routingBias` entries are not validated to be objects, so malformed profiles still pass verify and become no-ops
findings.recommendation: Reject any `routingBias` entry that is not an object with compute-role `floor`/`prefer` fields. Add a regression where a profile is a primitive/array (for example `"expert": "fast"`) and ensure `verify.mjs` exits non-zero.
